title: Gijón, Asturias — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Gijón, Asturias: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Gijón is a city in Asturias with a population of 270,000. A lively Asturian coastal city with beautiful beaches, excellent cider houses, and a stunning green surroundings.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
